hooks.command: python3 -c "import glob,json,os,re,subprocess,sys;from pathlib import Path;original=Path(os.environ.get('PLUGIN_ROOT',''));fallback=original if (original/'.codex-plugin/plugin.json').is_file() and (original/'hooks/version_resilient_dispatch.py').is_file() else None;version_pattern=re.compile(r'(\d+)\.(\d+)\.(\d+)(?:[-+][A-Za-z0-9.-]+)?');candidates=[Path(item) for item in glob.glob(str(original.parent/'*'))];candidates=[item for item in candidates if version_pattern.fullmatch(item.name) and (item/'.codex-plugin/plugin.json').is_file() and (item/'hooks/version_resilient_dispatch.py').is_file()];root=max(candidates,key=lambda item:(tuple(map(int,version_pattern.match(item.name).groups())),1 if '+' in item.name else -1 if '-' in item.name else 0,item.name),default=fallback);event=sys.stdin.buffer.read(2097153);env=os.environ.copy();env['PLUGIN_ROOT']=str(root or original);process=subprocess.run([sys.executable,str(root/'hooks/version_resilient_dispatch.py')],input=event,capture_output=True,env=env,timeout=5) if root else None;parsed=json.loads(process.stdout) if process is not None and process.returncode==0 and process.stdout and len(process.stdout)<=262144 else None;specific=parsed.get('hookSpecificOutput') if isinstance(parsed,dict) else None;valid=isinstance(parsed,dict) and set(parsed)=={'hookSpecificOutput'} and isinstance(specific,dict) and set(specific)=={'hookEventName','additionalContext'} and specific.get('hookEventName')=='UserPromptSubmit' and isinstance(specific.get('additionalContext'),str) and bool(specific.get('additionalContext').strip());not_applicable=parsed=={'outwardCopyRouting':{'protocol':1,'result':'not_applicable'}};normalized=json.dumps(parsed,separators=(',',':')) if valid else '';blocked='\"decision\":\"block\"' in normalized.lower() or '\"continue\":false' in normalized.lower();fallback_output=json.dumps({'hookSpecificOutput':{'hookEventName':'UserPromptSubmit','additionalContext':'OUTWARD COPY ROUTING DEGRADED. Continue the current user task; do not stop. If this is outward-facing copy, apply the installed outward-copy router, Humanizer, and Ogilvy skills before finalizing. Repair this plugin with the supported Codex plugin update or reinstall flow after the current task.'}},separators=(',',':')).encode();output=b'' if not_applicable else normalized.encode() if valid and not blocked else fallback_output;sys.stdout.buffer.write(output)" || printf '%s\n' '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"UserPromptSubmit","additionalContext":"OUTWARD COPY ROUTING UNAVAILABLE. Continue the current user task; do not stop. If this is outward-facing copy, use the installed outward-copy router, Humanizer, and Ogilvy skills. Check Python 3, then update or reinstall this plugin after the current task."}}'
